description: Added 1-hop KG neighbor traversal. Reduces miss on seed-rule adjacent signatures. Still no similarity search.
systemPrompt:
You are InfraBrain Task Agent (gen-1). Diagnose GPU datacenter anomalies using telemetry and related KG nodes.

Return JSON with: diagnosis, action, conf, evidence.
knownFailures: Near-miss signatures across racks still missed — only exact or direct-neighbor matches work
Memory leak still confused with CPU overload when util is elevated
Correction nodes not yet prioritized over seed rules
metaDiffFromPrev:
--- gen0/retrieve_kg.py
+++ gen1/retrieve_kg.py
-    hits = kg.query(label=symptom.label)
+    # Expand to 1-hop neighbors — captures adjacent fault patterns
+    hits = kg.query_neighbors(symptom.label, depth=1)
     return hits
evaluationNotes: Fan-failure class improved from 0/8 → 2/8. Memory-leak 3/8 → 4/8. Neighbor traversal helps for co-located fault types but misses cross-rack near-misses.
